notes: SHIP v1.14.303 - N-10 Crash Cart search-first (v1 core; owner 'ship the tile-filter, srch untouched'). Recon-driven scope (4-agent map of #pg-ref): the Crash Cart home is 7 STATIC hand-authored rf-cards (no array/render loop), cards carry NO tag metadata, and there is NO persistence hook -> sensible v1 = a sticky live tile-filter + a no-result recovery state; chips/pinned/recent DEFERRED (chips can't be honestly derived w/o real tags; pinned/recent need net-new localStorage for marginal gain on 7 tiles; voice/scanner explicitly deferred by the amendment). Pieces: (1) new sticky search input #ref-cardfilter (type=search, autocomplete/correct/capitalize off) as the FIRST child of #ref-grid, before .rf-glabel -> auto-scoped to the landing ONLY (grid is display:none on drill-in; #ref-back can't host it). (2) ref_filterCards(q): case-insensitive substring match over each card's rf-cname + rf-cmeta + aria-label (all REAL existing text, NO fabricated tags), toggles .rf-hidden per card, counts shown, toggles the .rf-noresult panel on 0-match; blank q shows all; No-Silent-Failures (console.warn + guarded phantomToast) if the grid nodes are missing. (3) no-result recovery panel (.rf-noresult[hidden]) as a sibling after .rf-grid-wrap: 'No tool matches' + a Clear-filter button that clears #ref-cardfilter and re-shows all. (4) filter RESET wired into the two existing landing-entry points: ref_showGrid() (Back-to-grid) + showMode('ref') (bottom-nav) so the landing never boots into a stale filtered/no-result state. (5) CSS rd-only + idle-dark (no glow): .rf-search-bar position:sticky top:0 z-index:5 (< nav 40, NO transform) bg #0a0c10; .rf-search-input dark #06080b w/ cyan focus ring; .rf-card.rf-hidden display:none; .rf-noresult dark panel + cyan Clear. Two-letter coverage honest: op->OPTICS, pl->PLATFORMS, cl/ib->CLI/IB, pa->PARTS, kn->KNOW, co->COMPASS(+Cooling), gh->GHOST ECHO. DELIBERATE (owner-ruled): #srch (the global fuzzy/SKU/intent overlay via doSearch/INDEX) is NOT touched or repurposed - the tile-filter is a distinct in-place narrow ('Filter tools...' placeholder) that coexists w/ #srch's deep-search overlay; owner ruled 'ship the tile-filter, srch untouched' after the 2-bar fork was surfaced. FIX-2 (B-01, open nav-dead bug on this page) NOT touched: the sticky bar pins at the TOP of the #pg-ref scroller (z<40, no transform/translateZ) so it neither worsens nor patches the fragile #rd-botnav layering. Gates: braces 11781->11795 balanced (+14 = 11 CSS rules + the filter fn), CRLF preserved, three-stamp .302->.303; ?legacy=1 byte-identical (all new markup/CSS/JS is body.rd/#ref-grid-scoped); black-glass .302 + N-06 Stage 2 markers confirmed intact. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): open Crash Cart -> a 'Filter tools...' bar sits above the 7 tiles; type 'op' -> only OPTICS remains, 'zz' -> 'No tool matches' + Clear; tap Clear or the input's native x -> all 7 return; drill into a tool + Back -> filter reset; switch tabs + back to Crash Cart -> reset. WATCH (iOS): does position:sticky pin cleanly inside the -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch scroller (no jitter/detach)? and does the 2nd bar read as complementary to #srch or cluttered (owner's on-device aesthetic call). NEXT queued: N-11 Work Active-Workspace.
